info.title: NWB Vending Materials Factory
info.description: x402 agent inventory: training, tools, and template packs for small-business ops.
info.x-guidance: Discover packs via catalog-manifest.json. Each GET path returns a paid JSON artifact after x402 USDC payment on Base. Start with catalog-manifest.json (public) for routing; fetch primary JSON files listed here when use_when matches.

get.description: Materials Factory training pack mf-train-001. Paid JSON for agents.
Deterministic rubric: should this task stay manual, use a template, gather data, or automate? Built for ops-heavy small business.
Route tasks to AI draft, human-only, or template path. Pairs with job spine comms packs.
Say-no and CO routing rubric for scope creep. Cross-links mf-tpl-012 and quote gate.
Complaint recovery spine route: severity branches, templates, log rows. Use before treating anger as new intake.
Rapid onboarding by role: templates, buddy, Day 7/30 checkpoints. HR adjacent to job spine.
Three-question character gauge with scored examples. Routes hires to mf-tpl-002 onboarding.
Job spine entry: classify intake, first touch within SLA, qualify before mf-tpl-006 quote.
15-minute ops overlay for spine. Five blocks, variants, cross-links payment and queue packs.
Quote gate: branches for rush, repeat, partial scope. Chains from mf-tpl-004 intake.
Delivery and handoff templates with unpaid hold and issue branches. Precedes mf-tpl-015 close.
Invoice and payment chase sequence. Pairs mf-tpl-005 money block and mf-tpl-029 plans.
Vendor issue playbook with client delay scripts. Mid-spine between production and delivery.
Post-accept kickoff checklist. Bridges quote win to proof and production handoffs.
Proof approval gate with written approval rule. Release trigger for floor and mf-tpl-017.
Change order mid-job scripts. Works with mf-tool-003 and mf-tpl-013 updates.
Client status update templates. Spine glue during active jobs.
Quote follow-up sequence between mf-tpl-006 send and mf-tpl-010 accept.
